requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 230 V / 50 Hz, Type C/E Plug

summary.en: Tunisia operates a 230 V / 50 Hz AC power supply with Type C (Europlug two-pin round) and Type E (French two-pin round with earth socket) plugs and sockets. Wireless and IoT devices with mains power input must be designed and tested for 230 V / 50 Hz operation and must be supplied with or compatible with Type C or Type E plugs. Electrical safety testing is referenced against IEC 62368-1 or IEC 60950-1 (legacy) as adopted by INNORPI NT standards. Products must bear applicable safety markings on the label.
summary.zh: 突尼斯使用230V/50Hz交流电源，采用C型（欧洲标准双圆针）和E型（法式双圆针带接地插座）插头和插座。具有市电输入的无线及物联网设备须针对230V/50Hz运行进行设计和测试，且须配备或兼容C型或E型插头。电气安全测试参照INNORPI NT标准采纳的IEC 62368-1或IEC 60950-1（旧版）进行。产品须在标签上印有适用的安全标志。
summary.zht: 突尼斯使用230V/50Hz交流電源，採用C型（歐洲標準雙圓針）和E型（法式雙圓針帶接地插座）插頭和插座。具有市電輸入的無線及物聯網裝置須針對230V/50Hz運行進行設計和測試，且須配備或兼容C型或E型插頭。電氣安全測試參照INNORPI NT標準採納的IEC 62368-1或IEC 60950-1（舊版）進行。產品須在標籤上印有適用的安全標誌。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62368-1 (Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment — Safety) — adopted via INNORPI NT
IEC 60950-1 (legacy safety standard, may still be referenced for older product types)
Tunisia power supply standard: 230 V / 50 Hz, Type C / E plug (IEC 60083 compatible)

summary.en: China operates a 220 V / 50 Hz AC power supply with Type A (two flat parallel pins) and Type I (two flat angled pins) plugs (GB 2099 / GB 1002). Electrical safety for wireless and IT equipment is assessed under GB 4943 (now transitioning to GB/T 62368-1, aligned to IEC 62368-1) via CCC. Chinese plugs (Type A/I) are not compatible with Tunisian Type C/E sockets. Voltage is nominally compatible (220 V CN vs 230 V TN), but plug type and socket format require adaptation.
summary.zh: 中国使用220V/50Hz交流电源，采用A型（双扁平针）和I型（双斜扁针）插头（GB 2099 / GB 1002）。无线及IT设备的电气安全通过CCC依据GB 4943（现正向与IEC 62368-1对接的GB/T 62368-1过渡）进行评估。中国插头（A/I型）与突尼斯C/E型插座不兼容。电压名义上兼容（中国220V vs 突尼斯230V），但插头类型和插座格式需要适配。
summary.zht: 中國使用220V/50Hz交流電源，採用A型（雙扁平針）和I型（雙斜扁針）插頭（GB 2099 / GB 1002）。無線及IT設備的電氣安全通過CCC依據GB 4943（現正向與IEC 62368-1對接的GB/T 62368-1過渡）進行評估。中國插頭（A/I型）與突尼斯C/E型插座不相容。電壓名義上相容（中國220V vs 突尼斯230V），但插頭類型和插座格式需要適配。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943 / GB/T 62368-1 (electrical safety for IT and audio/video equipment)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) covering electrical safety for applicable categories
GB 2099 / GB 1002 (Chinese plug and socket standards — Type A/I)

gap.en: Chinese Type A/I plugs are physically incompatible with Tunisian Type C/E sockets; devices for the Tunisian market must be supplied with Type C or Type E plugs or a compatible universal adapter. Chinese GB 4943 / CCC electrical safety test reports are not directly accepted for Tunisian market compliance; IEC 62368-1 or INNORPI NT-aligned test reports are required. Voltage is nominally close (220 V CN vs 230 V TN, both 50 Hz) but the product must be rated and tested for 230 V operation.
gap.zh: 中国A/I型插头与突尼斯C/E型插座物理上不兼容；面向突尼斯市场的设备须配备C型或E型插头或兼容的通用转接器。中国GB 4943 / CCC电气安全测试报告不被直接接受用于突尼斯市场合规；须提供符合IEC 62368-1或INNORPI NT标准的测试报告。电压名义上接近（中国220V vs 突尼斯230V，均为50Hz），但产品须额定并经过230V运行测试。
gap.zht: 中國A/I型插頭與突尼斯C/E型插座物理上不相容；面向突尼斯市場的裝置須配備C型或E型插頭或相容的通用轉接器。中國GB 4943 / CCC電氣安全測試報告不被直接接受用於突尼斯市場合規；須提供符合IEC 62368-1或INNORPI NT標準的測試報告。電壓名義上接近（中國220V vs 突尼斯230V，均為50Hz），但產品須額定並經過230V運行測試。

source.publisher: INNORPI — Institut National de la Normalisation et de la Propriété Industrielle (Tunisia)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese Type A/I plugs are incompatible with Tunisian Type C/E sockets. Devices must be re-engineered or adapted for Type C/E plugs and tested to IEC 62368-1 or INNORPI NT-aligned safety standards for 230 V / 50 Hz operation. Chinese CCC electrical safety approval does not substitute for Tunisian INNORPI/NT compliance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国A/I型插头与突尼斯C/E型插座不兼容。设备须重新设计或改装为C/E型插头，并按IEC 62368-1或INNORPI NT对接安全标准针对230V/50Hz运行进行测试。中国CCC电气安全批准不能替代突尼斯INNORPI/NT合规。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國A/I型插頭與突尼斯C/E型插座不相容。裝置須重新設計或改裝為C/E型插頭，並按IEC 62368-1或INNORPI NT對接安全標準針對230V/50Hz運行進行測試。中國CCC電氣安全批准不能替代突尼斯INNORPI/NT合規。
